name: articles_correct
answer: Yesterday I took a train to Brighton. The train was crowded. We had lunch near the sea. The food was excellent. Travel often changes how people see the world.

name: articles_extra_pronoun
answer: Yesterday I took a train to Brighton. The train was crowded. We had lunch near the sea. The food was excellent. I travel often changes how people see the world.

name: articles_repeated_wrong
answer: Yesterday I took a train to Brighton. A train was crowded. We had lunch near the sea. The food was excellent. Travel often changes how people see the world.
